title: Craft Perfect - Smooth Card - Ivory White - A4 (10 Pack) - 240gsm - Acid & Lignin Free - Ideal for Die Cutting and Card Bases
features: Premium Quality: Smooth A4 card in ivory white, perfect for elegant and sophisticated crafts.
Sturdy 240gsm: Ideal for creating die-cut shapes, card bases, and 3D projects with ease.
Acid & Lignin Free: Ensures long-lasting vibrancy and prevents yellowing.
Easy to Work With: Perfect for cutting, curving, creasing, and embossing.
10 Sheets per Pack: A4 size (215mm x 279mm) with a smooth finish, available in 6 versatile colors.
